    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    ACCELERATION - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Horizontal acceleration per frame while movement key is pressed.
    addProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Registers and renders a projectile.
    allSprite - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterPane
    Sprite resource paths in the same order as character list indices.
    ammoText - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    UI text showing ammo/reload information for ammo-based characters.
    application - package application
     
    Archer - Class in logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters
    Archer ranged character that fires arrow projectiles.
    Archer() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Creates Archer with tuned base stats, weapon sprite, and origin snapshots.
    atk - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Base attack damage.
    attack() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Executes attack behavior based on current character type (ranged/hybrid/melee).
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Performs character attack action.
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
     
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
     
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Barista
    Spawns a coffee projectile attack.
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Fires a bullet projectile if shooting constraints pass.
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Not used directly; ranged attacks should go through tryAttack.
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Not used directly; ranged attacks are spawned via tryAttack.
    attack(float, float, boolean, Player) - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Not used directly; ranged attacks should be routed via tryAttack.
    ATTACK - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.PlayerState
    Active attack state.
    Attackable - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Marker interface for entities that can perform attacks.
    attackAnimation() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Updates weapon animation frames and triggers attack execution at hit frames.
    AttackAnimation - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Contract for characters that support frame-based attack animations.
    AttackCooldown - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.AttackState
    Character is waiting for attack-speed cooldown before attacking again.
    AttackData - Class in logic.entity
    Immutable-like container describing melee hitbox dimensions.
    AttackData(double, double) - Constructor for class logic.entity.AttackData
    Creates attack hitbox data.
    attackFrames - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Ordered attack animation frames.
    attackHeld - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Prevents repeated attack trigger while attack key is held down.
    attackHitbox - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Temporary melee attack hitbox node.
    attacking - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    True when an attack action is currently active.
    Attacking - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.AttackState
    Character is currently in attack animation or startup.
    attackKey - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Key binding for normal attack.
    attackRange - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Effective attack range unit for class-specific attacks.
    attackSpeed - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Attack speed factor used by player logic cooldown handling.
    attackState - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Current attack state used by combat logic.
    AttackState - Enum Class in logic.gameLogic
    Attack state machine values used by player and character attack logic.
    AttackState() - Constructor for enum class logic.gameLogic.AttackState
     
    AudioManager - Class in logic.audio
    Centralized audio utility for background music and sound effects.
    AudioManager() - Constructor for class logic.audio.AudioManager
